label: Arduino: Select Connected Board (fzf)
command: line=$(arduino-cli board list | fzf --header-lines=1); if [ -n "$line" ]; then port=$(echo "$line" | awk '{print $1}'); fqbn=$(echo "$line" | grep -oE '[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+:[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+:[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+' | head -n 1); echo "ARDUINO_PORT=$port" > .env; echo "ARDUINO_FQBN=$fqbn" >> .env; echo "✅ Updated .env with Port=$port, FQBN=$fqbn"; else echo "❌ No board selected."; fi

label: Arduino: Compile Current Sketch
command: source .env 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -z "$ARDUINO_FQBN" ]; then echo '❌ Error: ARDUINO_FQBN not set. Run "Arduino: Select Connected Board (fzf)" first.'; exit 1; fi; arduino-cli compile --fqbn "$ARDUINO_FQBN" "$ZED_DIRNAME"

label: Arduino: Upload Current Sketch
command: source .env 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -z "$ARDUINO_FQBN" ] || [ -z "$ARDUINO_PORT" ]; then echo '❌ Error: Board config missing. Run "Arduino: Select Connected Board (fzf)" first.'; exit 1; fi; arduino-cli upload --fqbn "$ARDUINO_FQBN" -p "$ARDUINO_PORT" "$ZED_DIRNAME"

label: Arduino: Compile & Upload Current Sketch
command: source .env 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -z "$ARDUINO_FQBN" ] || [ -z "$ARDUINO_PORT" ]; then echo '❌ Error: Board config missing. Run "Arduino: Select Connected Board (fzf)" first.'; exit 1; fi; arduino-cli compile --fqbn "$ARDUINO_FQBN" "$ZED_DIRNAME" && arduino-cli upload --fqbn "$ARDUINO_FQBN" -p "$ARDUINO_PORT" "$ZED_DIRNAME"

label: Arduino: Install Board Core (from .env)
command: source .env 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -z "$ARDUINO_FQBN" ]; then echo '❌ Error: ARDUINO_FQBN not set. Run "Arduino: Select Connected Board (fzf)" first.'; exit 1; fi; core=$(echo "$ARDUINO_FQBN" | cut -d: -f1,2); echo "📦 Installing core: $core"; arduino-cli core update-index && arduino-cli core install "$core"

label: Arduino: Update LSP Database (clangd)
command: source .env 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -z "$ARDUINO_FQBN" ]; then echo '❌ Error: ARDUINO_FQBN not set. Select board first.'; exit 1; fi; echo "🔄 Generating compile_commands.json..."; arduino-cli compile --fqbn "$ARDUINO_FQBN" --only-compilation-database --build-path "$ZED_DIRNAME/build" "$ZED_DIRNAME" && mv "$ZED_DIRNAME/build/compile_commands.json" "$ZED_DIRNAME/" && rm -rf "$ZED_DIRNAME/build" && echo "✅ LSP Database generated in $ZED_DIRNAME!"

label: Arduino: Install Required Libraries
command: arduino-cli lib install "hd44780" "Adafruit MPU6050" "Adafruit Unified Sensor" && source .env 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -n "$ARDUINO_FQBN" ]; then echo "🔄 Generating LSP database..."; arduino-cli compile --fqbn "$ARDUINO_FQBN" --only-compilation-database --build-path "$ZED_DIRNAME/build" "$ZED_DIRNAME" && mv "$ZED_DIRNAME/build/compile_commands.json" "$ZED_DIRNAME/" && rm -rf "$ZED_DIRNAME/build" && echo "✅ Libraries installed & LSP configured!"; else echo "⚠️ Libraries installed. Select a board (fzf) to finish configuring LSP."; fi
